mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk (knowledge_base_id, document_id, chunk_index, content, content_hash, es_doc_id, token_count, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{knowledgeBaseId}, #{documentId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, #{contentHash}, #{esDocId}, #{tokenCount}, COALESCE(#{version}, 1), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT kc.*, kd.file_name, kd.file_path FROM knowledge_chunk kc LEFT JOIN knowledge_document kd ON kd.id = kc.document_id WHERE kc.document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY kc.chunk_index ASC

SELECT kc.id, kc.knowledge_base_id, kc.document_id, kc.chunk_index, kc.content, kc.content_hash, kc.es_doc_id, kd.file_name, kd.file_path, kc.token_count, kc.version, kc.created_at, kc.updated_at FROM knowledge_chunk kc LEFT JOIN knowledge_document kd ON kd.id = kc.document_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND kc.knowledge_base_id = #{knowledgeBaseId} ORDER BY kc.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_chunk SET es_doc_id = #{esDocId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
